name: Bitcoin Technical Forums & Mailing Lists
description: Discussion forums and mailing lists where Bitcoin protocol design and implementation are discussed

forums.name: Bitcoin Development Mailing List
forums.description: Official Bitcoin development mailing list for BIPs and protocol discussions. Moved from Linux Foundation to Google Groups.
forums.notes: Primary venue for BIP proposals and consensus-critical discussions

recent_topics.title: P2QRH / BIP-360 - Quantum Resistant Addresses
recent_topics.description: Proposal for pay-to-quantum-resistant-hash addresses as defense against future quantum computers

recent_topics.title: BIP-352 Silent Payments
recent_topics.description: Privacy improvement for receiving payments without address reuse

recent_topics.title: Script Restoration (varops budget, tapscript leaf 0xc2)
recent_topics.description: Proposals to restore disabled opcodes with resource limits

recent_topics.title: P2P Feature Negotiation
recent_topics.description: Anthony Towns' proposal for generalized P2P message for feature announcement
recent_topics.author: Anthony Towns

recent_topics.title: UTXO Set Management
recent_topics.description: Debates on handling dust UTXOs from Ordinals/Stamps

recent_topics.title: OP_CTV Footgun Discussion
recent_topics.description: Chris Stewart's analysis of CTV edge cases that can make outputs unspendable
recent_topics.author: Chris Stewart

forums.name: Delving Bitcoin
forums.description: A place to dig deep into Bitcoin. Technical discussions on protocol design, implementation, economics, and philosophy.

topics.protocol-design: Proposals and analysis of Bitcoin protocol improvements

forums.name: Bitcoin TLDR
forums.description: AI-powered summaries of Bitcoin technical discussions from mailing lists and forums
forums.notes: Good for catching up on mailing list discussions

forums.name: Bitcoin Stack Exchange
forums.description: Q&A for Bitcoin developers and users. High-quality technical answers.
forums.notes: Featured weekly in Bitcoin Optech Newsletter

forums.name: Bitcoin Core GitHub
forums.description: Bitcoin Core repository - PRs, issues, and releases
